sets.comment: Related Website Set for T&C Appliance & HVAC Repair supports Google's third-party cookie phaseout by declaring which domains are owned and related, allowing them to maintain shared cookies and data access across the business ecosystem.

aiAgents.name: Gemini Genius
aiAgents.purpose: Primary AI agent for data processing and business operations

dataIntegration.comment: All AI agents route data through the RWS infrastructure to ensure data persistence and prevent system collapse
